metadata.title:
BIG SUMS FROM CITY


AND COUNTY MAY NOT


REACH BOOSTERS CLUB

pages.raw_text:
The Boosters club" has struck
a snag In its progress toward its
desired appropriation Of $4,000 from
the city treasury.


Rurnor has it that City Comp
troIIer Farley, acting on the adj
vice OF Corporation Counsel Ger
agility, will decline to issue any
warrant, on the grounds that city
funds are not approprlateable for
that purpose.


The same question arose over the
matter of the appropriation of
5000 by the county for the purposes
of the Lewis and Clark exposition.
1t was then mooted whether the
scheme of taxation includes money
for any such specific purpose.


Discussion is being heard every
where concerning the manner in
which the chamber of commerce
and its newest offspring, the $780,.
600 club, have been conducting
their campaigns. Over against the
immediate appropriation of $1,000 to
be expended in Spokane for pub
lished publicity in the home mar
ket, is placed in the argument that
the money paid to one Rohraback-
